title: Ilari Pihlajisto
text: Home * People * Ilari Pihlajisto Ilari Pihlajisto , a Finnish freetime and computer chess programmer. He is author of the Chess Engine Communication Protocol compatible open source chess program Sloppy . Along with Arto Jonsson , Ilari is co-author of Cute Chess , a cross-platform graphical user interface for chess engines that use the Chess Engine Communication Protocol or Universal Chess Interface , and the command line tool for engine-engine matches , Cutechess-cli [1] .
